name: SECURITY FEDERAL CORP
summary: Security Federal Corporation is a South Carolina bank holding company for Security Federal Bank, a state-chartered commercial bank headquartered in Aiken, SC. Founded in 1922, the Bank operates 19 branch offices across South Carolina and Georgia counties. It offers retail banking, loans, investment securities management through SFINV, and insurance (auto, business, home) through SFINS. It is a certified CDFI serving low-to-moderate income communities.
